main.welcome4: Got a project in mind? Let's chat

expertiseItems.webDevelopmentDescription: Specializing in creating dynamic and responsive web applications. My experience covers both frontend, with technologies like React and Next.js, and backend, developing robust APIs and services.
expertiseItems.graphicDesignDescription: Creating visual identities, attractive graphic materials, and motion graphics. I use tools like Photoshop and After Effects to design logos, animations, and other visual elements that communicate effectively.
expertiseItems.digitalMarketingDescription: Experience in digital marketing strategies, including SEO, content management, and social media campaigns to improve online presence and attract potential clients.
expertiseItems.uiUxDesignDescription: Focused on designing intuitive and functional interfaces. I create mockups and prototypes to ensure the user experience is optimal, from navigation to final interaction.

main.getInTouchDescription: Let's build something great together -- feel free to connect with me through any of the platforms above.

services.title: My Services
services.webDevelopmentServiceDescription: Creating dynamic, responsive, and high-performance web applications tailored to your needs.
services.graphicDesignServiceDescription: Designing attractive visual identities and graphic materials that effectively communicate your message.
services.digitalMarketingServiceDescription: Implementing SEO strategies and content management to improve your online presence.

aboutPage.name: Miguel Burgos
aboutPage.headerAlt: Abstract network of interconnected nodes, representing technology and software development.
aboutPage.fullAboutText: I am currently studying Software Engineering at Fundación Universitaria Compensar, where I am deepening my knowledge in software architecture, agile methodologies, and development patterns. I am also a technician in Marketing and Sales, with experience in administrative tasks, customer service, and sales, which gives me a broad vision of business needs. I’m passionate about art and technology, and I have independently developed skills in design and multimedia production. My goal is to combine my technical knowledge with my communication skills to develop useful and well-thought-out projects that truly respond to people's needs.
aboutPage.shortAboutText: I am currently pursuing a degree in Software Engineering...

salonderechazados.title: Salón de Rechazados
salonderechazados.description: Salón de Rechazados is a space for those who feel cinema in a deeper and more personal way. It explores the lasting impact a film leaves behind, moving away from technical critiques and box-office rankings.

yuwelongo.title: YuweLongo
yuwelongo.description: YuweLongo is an interactive dictionary of the Nasa Yuwe indigenous language, accompanied by an educational game. The frontend is built with React and the Java backend (Jakarta EE / Servlets) handles authentication using JWT.

futdraft.title: 1vs1 FutDraft
futdraft.description: Interactive web application designed for soccer fans to create, visualize, and share FPC lineups. This project, developed as part of my portfolio, demonstrates the ability to build a modern, interactive, and scalable full-stack application.

petlink.title: Pet Link
petlink.description: A system designed for the management and security of pets. It allows owners to create detailed profiles for their pets, linked to identification tags with unique QR codes.

coonadoc.title: Coonadoc
coonadoc.description: Website for a contributions and credit cooperative.

picasyfijas.title: Picas y Fijas
picasyfijas.description: A classic logic game to guess a secret number. Developed as a project for the Algorithms class.

textencryptor.title: Text Encryptor
textencryptor.description: A simple tool to encrypt and decrypt messages. Developed as a project for the Front-end course at Alura Latam.

nexwork.title: NexWork
nexwork.description: NexWork is a mobile application for Android that connects service providers with clients within a two-way marketplace. The platform facilitates the search, booking, and management of services through a role-based system for clients, providers, and administrators.

toshiro.title: Toshiro Sushi Carousel
toshiro.description: Promotional carousel designed for the social media of Toshiro, a sushi restaurant, highlighting its star products and brand identity.

sdr.title: Brand Manual Salón de Rechazados
sdr.description: A personal project exploring film analysis, video essays, and film criticism. A space for those who truly feel the magic of cinema, going beyond conventional reviews.

coopfiligrana.title: Coopfiligrana Stories Carousel
coopfiligrana.description: Carousel with stories designed for the social media of the Coopfiligrana cooperative.

smarthome.title: SmartHome Dashboard Mockup
smarthome.description: Company that enables users to monitor and control their homes' energy efficiency, perimeter security, and environmental comfort (lighting and climate) in real time, transforming complex sensor data into actionable insights to reduce environmental impact and improve quality of life.

sbcleanco.title: SBCleanCo Website Mockup
sbcleanco.description: Company that offers cleaning services for businesses, stores, galleries, gyms, and spas.

FlowSync.title: FlowSync Ladingpage Mockup
FlowSync.description: It is an AI-powered fleet and last-mile management platform.

sqlServer.title: SQL with Oracle MySQL Server Training
